description: Style NoteThese super comfy cropped shorts from inaya made with soft and smooth fabric is simply just what we need when chilling out at home. These shorts are stylish and you can even pair this with a tee for a quick grocery run.  What's more it's organic - the  fabric (modal) is cellulose fibre extracted from beechwood!Product DetailsBright pink cropped shorts (ends approximately below the knee), has an elasticated waistband at the back with a drawstring feature in front and a printed tag-less innerMaterial and Care95% modal and 3% lycraMachine wash coldDo not bleach or tumble dryUse cool ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8"and waist 28") is wearing a size M
